name: Ziti with Cheese
recipeIngredient: 1/2 pound whole wheat ziti or spirals
1 1/2 cups diced mozzarella and provolone, any proportion
2 tablespoons oil (preferably at least part olive oil)
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring a pot of water to a boil and salt slightly.
2. Cook the pasta until just tender, about 12 minutes.
3. Meanwhile, combine the cheeses, parsley, and basil in a small bowl.
4. In a small saucepan or heatproof measuring cup, heat the oil over low heat with the split garlic cloves until the garlic is just browned.
5. Discard the garlic.
6. Drain the pasta.
7. Return it to the pot and toss with the cheeses, herbs, and hot garlic oil.
8. Warm gently until the cheese softens but still holds its shape.
9. Season generously with pepper.
10. Serves 4 (served as a main course with a small salad).
